portfolio_cases_subway_p1: As a leader in the fast-moving cybersecurity space, Abnormal AI had already invested in a powerful web stack designed for speed: a Next.js site on Vercel, using Plasmic for visual page creation. While the technology was in place, translating the marketing team's ambitious vision into reality required specialized resources. Abnormal AI partnered with Monogram to be the specialized development resource needed to bring that vision to life.

design_services_blockquote: We focus on delivering the best user experience across all platforms and devices. From concept to functional prototypes, we develop engaging, user-centric digital experiences that help our clients express their pride.
design_process_p1_copy: Every design project we work on starts its journey as ink that flows onto a piece of paper. Our thoughts manifest through rapid ideation and we listen carefully.
design_process_p2_copy: In the spirit of rapid ideation, as soon as we have a light bulb moment on paper, we take the process to build quick prototypes to demonstrate our thoughts.
design_process_p3_copy: This is when the design comes to life. We carefully craft each and every pixel of the design, down to the minor details, to create a real vision of the product.
design_process_p4_copy: Working with companies large and small, we understand the importance of making design repeatable and consistent. That's why we build detailed style guides.
design_process_p5_copy: We take the UI design and create a moving, functional prototype that helps define just how your product would look and work. Usability is tested here.
design_process_p6_copy: One of the biggest benefits of working with c3labs is we can build everything we design, and retain our top-notch quality of work to the development phase.
design_mediums_p1_copy: Web apps and design systems including typography, grid systems, buttons, menus, sidebars, and more. We design the pieces to build your software more usable and beautiful than ever.
design_mediums_p2_copy: iOS, iPadOS and Android apps are our home turf because we use them every day. We unleash our creativity to design the most usable and attractive mobile experiences of the industry.
design_mediums_p3_copy: Probably one of the most satisfying things for us is to take a step back and see how we have improved software that was confusing, unattractive, and unusable into something far better.
design_mediums_p4_copy: c3labs has designed and developed dozens of world-class web experiences with a quality that's on par or exceeding that of marketing and branding agencies. Our design just works.
design_booking_description: Claim a time to meet. We will help you do the rest.
engineering_services_blockquote: We engineer fast, scalable, and solid digital products using modern composable technologies, AI, and engineering-first methodologies. Our disciplined approach ensures the custom engineering solutions fulfill the unique requirements of your business.
engineering_process_p1_copy: We put our ability to listen first and foremost. Our business analysts and professionals sit down with you to hear your needs.
engineering_process_p2_copy: We use what we learned from the previous step to build user stories and use cases. We involve you in this process to ensure we stay on target.
engineering_process_p3_copy: This is where we pinpoint an accurate estimate of logistics involving your project— including but not limited to cost, timelines, and resources.
engineering_process_p4_copy: We fire up our project planners, define your project, assign tasks and get ready to sprint. We just can't wait to get started!
engineering_process_p5_copy: This is the main step. We use our deeply-rooted agile methodologies to run a series of sprints to build your product, evaluating regularly.
engineering_process_p6_copy: Nearing completion, we bring out our magnifying lenses and callipers to measure and inspect every single pixel, interaction, and edge-case.
engineering_process_p7_copy: Congratulations! You just got yourself an awesome digital experience made by c3labs. This isn't the end of the journey — it's just the beginning.
engineering_principles_p1_copy: Ideally, designers are developers — developers likewise designers. It’s form and function in perfect concert.
engineering_principles_p2_copy: We’re here to bring your vision into production. No hacks, no shortcuts.
engineering_principles_p3_copy: We build with powerful, distributed web services tailored to your project’s specific requirements.
engineering_principles_p4_copy: We take pride in delivering clean code that your team can maintain and iterate on.
engineering_principles_p5_copy: Everything we ship is specialized for its purpose and optimized for responsiveness, accessibility, and speed.
engineering_principles_p6_copy: Because we use composable design components, engineers aren’t bottlenecked by design and everything moves faster.

service_principles_blockquote: You are our priority from Day 1. Anytime, anywhere, anyhow - we have your back. Our clients expect and get world-class market research, development, design, and consulting services.

manifest_1_copy: The Monolithic CMS Growth Trap - Whether you're running WordPress, Craft CMS, or Webflow, the story is remarkably similar. These platforms make perfect sense early on—they're accessible, fast to deploy, and don't require significant development investment. But as your content scales and your team grows, the cracks start to show. At Monogram, we've migrated dozens of companies from each of these platforms to headless solutions, and while the technical details differ, the core issue remains the same. What worked for 50 pages starts to fall apart when you scale to hundreds or even thousands of pages.
